titleStmt.title: SII 24.63: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 63. (A.R. No. 62 of 1892.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of 6(1/4) kāśu by Araiyaṉ Garuḍavāhaṉaṉ alias Kāliṅgarāyan for offerings during specified festivals on the occasion of the recitation of Tēṭṭaruntiṟal, a hymn composed by Kulaśēkhara-Āḻvār. The record is dated in the [1]8th regnal year of the king.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. III, No. 70.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta pu poṉ nemiya[ ḷavu n=tan] nemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayirmuṉaik kontaḷavaracar tan taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porp pari naṭāttik kīrttiyai
niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit te marukamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai naṉnilappāvai tanimaiyuntavira vantu punitaṟṟirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉnaṭi Iraṇṭum taṭa muṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyā
ṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ kuṭai Iru nila vaḷākam Eṅkaṇu ntanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Oru tani meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭutan=ta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavaṉ karuntalai paruntalai
ttiṭat tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa In ṟ kulap piṟai pol niṟpiḻaiyennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tan kai villetir koṭā vikkalan tar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavun turatti veṅkaṇum
paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina vīramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷu nṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭal kaḷun talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticait tannāḷukantu tānum tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭa palapala mutuku payattetir māṟa ja
yapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantai yariṭṭamu miḷātu viṭṭa veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pā koḷḷat tiruvu
ḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkaḷum poru kkulaṅka ta n=tiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal paṭarvatu polat tan peruñ ceṉai Evip pañcavar Aiyvarum poruta moykkaḷattañci veru n(o)ḷitte ttu
ṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟai veñcura meṟṟik koṟṟa vijaiyastampam ticai to tti muttin calāpamu mutta miṭ potiyilu mattaveṅkaripaṭu maiyyaccayyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇ
kaṭal malaināṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellām tanivicum peṟamāveṟiya tan varutaniṟṟalaivarai kalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟunilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟaikoḷ vīrasiṅhāsanan=tiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅko ḷiyāramu n=tiruppuyattāṅkaḷumpoliya vīramun=tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar va kavīṟ[ ṟirun=taruḷiya]
kovirājakesaripanmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅka coḻa devaṟku yāṇ neṭṭāvatu 2 Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkatevarkku śrīkāriyañceykiṟa Atikā rikaḷ niṣatarājar Eval paṭiyum śrīvayiṣṇavavāriyam tiruveḻutināṭudāsa- rum vaṭamaturap piṟan=tānampiyum Irāyūrāḷi nampiyum r nārāyaṇa nampi
yum perumpaṟṟappuliyūr śrīcaṭakopadāsarum mārkkamaṅkalattu Arikulavāraṇa nampiyum śrīpaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan kurukai kāvalan Ārāvamutum Āritan tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyān cirākavanum Āritan kecuvan taniiḷañciṅkamum pāratāyan kecuvan Aṟivariyānum pāratāyan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa
n śrīkṛṣṇanum pāritan Ārāvamutu cirāmanum sabhaikkaṇakku Arayan Ampala �ṟṟuvappiriyanum śrīvayiṣṇavakkaṇakku tiruveṅkaṭa van comanāna patineṭṭunāṭu kiḻavanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻva nmikaḷom Arayan [ garu] ḍavāhanāna kāliṅkarāyarkku nāṅkaḷ sammatittut tiṭṭukku paricāvatu .
Appikai terttirunāḷilum paṅkūnittirunāḷilum tirttam pirasā tittaruḷina Anṟirā tiruppunnaikkiḻ Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu teṭṭarun=tiṟal keṭṭa ruḷum potu Iṟṟai nāḷāl tirunāḷ Onṟukku Amutu ceytaruḷum Appamutu nūṟukku veṇṭum paḻavarici patakkum paruppu munnāḻiyum ney mun nāḻiyum caṟka
rai nūṟṟup palamum miḷaku muḻākkum cirakam Uḻākkum Uppu muḻākkum vāḻaippaḻam Aimpatum teṅkāy Aiñcum Iḷaniramutu pattum Aṭaikkāyamutu nūṟṟirupatum kaṟpūratayilam Oru ceviṭaraiyum teriilaippaṟṟu panniraṇṭum kaṟpūram Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum Appamutukku māviṭippārkku niraṭṭuvār
kkum viṟakiṭuvārkkum Appamutu cuṭuvārkkum ku kalattukkum Uḷḷiṭṭu maṟṟum veṇṭuvanavaiyiṟṟukku n=tirātittaval cella Ivar Oṭukkina kācu Āṟe kāl . Ikkācu Āṟe kāluṅ koṇṭu policaiyāl Iraṇṭu tirunāḷilum Ippaṭiyey can=tirātittaval Amuti ceyvikkak kaṭavomāka
vum . Ippaṭi kalveṭṭivittukkoḷḷap pe vum . Ippaṭi Icaintu sammātat tiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷo . Itu can=tirātittaval celuttuvikka kaṭavomānom tiruvaraṅkattu mahāsabhaiyom . Itu śrīvayiṣṇavarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
